questions.question: Blue/green в Flink — что делает Operator с upgradeMode: savepoint при изменении image?

options.text: Запускает обе версии параллельно, дeleg-ит cutover пользователю
Sequential: trigger savepoint → wait DONE → cancel old job → update JM Deployment с new image → wait JM ready → submit new job from savepoint
Restart pod с новым image без savepoint
Создаёт второй FlinkDeployment с новым именем

questions.explanation: Operator делает sequential savepoint-restart, не parallel blue/green. Шаги: (1) Trigger savepoint REST POST /jobs/{id}/savepoints; (2) Poll status, wait DONE; (3) Cancel job; (4) Update JM Deployment с новым image; (5) Wait pod ready; (6) Submit job с --fromSavepoint. Между шагами 3-6 — gap (downtime). Для true parallel blue/green (обе версии одновременно processing) нужна manual choreography с двумя FlinkDeployments + shadow topic verification — operator этого не делает automatically.
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок — Через Flink Kubernetes Operator: upgradeMode: savepoint

questions.question: Savepoint format choice: когда canonical, когда native?

options.text: Native — для regular upgrades (same major version, same backend) — 3-5x быстрее. Canonical — для major Flink upgrade или backend migration (RocksDB→ForSt) — cross-version и cross-backend safe

questions.explanation: Native: backend-specific format, 3-5x быстрее savepoint creation, но locked к конкретному backend (RocksDB native ≠ ForSt native). OK для most upgrades same major version + same backend. Canonical: universal format, медленнее (полная reserialize state), но cross-version, cross-backend. Используйте canonical для: Flink 1.20 → 2.2 major upgrade, RocksDB → ForSt migration, любая ситуация где может потребоваться restore в different configuration. Default — native. Override: `state.savepoints.type: canonical` или `execution.savepoint.format: canonical`.
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок — Savepoint format choice: canonical vs native

questions.question: 5 минут после cutover Prometheus alerts: checkpoint failure 100%, RocksDB errors. Что делать?

options.text: Rollback: получить savepoint path из status.jobStatus.savepointInfo, kubectl patch FlinkDeployment с прежним image + initialSavepointPath = saved path. Operator делает rollback workflow

questions.explanation: Срочный rollback workflow: (1) Найти savepoint path triggered перед upgrade: kubectl get flinkdeployment -o jsonpath='{.status.jobStatus.savepointInfo.lastSavepoint.location}'. (2) kubectl patch с прежним image tag + initialSavepointPath=path. (3) Operator делает rollback. Pre-deploy checks которые помогли бы: staging environment с production savepoint, schema evolution validation tests, UID stability checks, canary deployment, quarterly rollback drill. Critical: savepoint retention должен быть >= rollback window (минимум 24-48 часов).

questions.question: С ForSt и disaggregated state savepoint становится metadata-only operation — практически instant независимо от state size, что даёт near-zero downtime blue/green upgrades.
questions.explanation: True. ForSt с disaggregated state (FLIP-427) хранит primary state на S3, локальный диск только cache. Savepoint = запись metadata pointers, не копирование state data. Savepoint 200GB занимает секунды а не минуты. Это game-changer для blue/green: downtime между шагами 1 (trigger savepoint) и 5 (start new from savepoint) — секунды. Combined с FLIP-291 in-place rescale получаем near-zero-downtime deployments. RocksDB local — savepoint требует физического copy, всё ещё медленно для большого state.
